arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka’s welcome return opens up thrilling new possibilities for Arsenal | David Hytner
arts.sum: Arsenal’s ‘star boy’ is the player who epitomises Mikel Arteta’s team and he was hugely influential against Real Madrid It was a brilliant teaser, one that had Arsenal fans smiling and shaking their heads, protesting loudly, essentially calling it immoral. Deal or no deal. They win the Premier League title. But they sell Bukayo Saka. It was posted by the @goalglobal TikTok account at the start of last season and the reactions of those in front of the camera shone a light on just how loved Saka is at Arsenal. The consensus was no deal. It would not be worth it because some things just mean more. “That’s our star boy, that’s like your son,” one of the supporters said. The video was liked by 3 million people. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Bend it like Decs! Arsenal hero Declan Rice walks the Fashion Week catwalk, calls David his icon, came through cruel trolling of his partner... and now his free-kicks are Beckham-esque too!
arts.sum: Rice will be the next footballing star to have playgrounds across the country in thrall as boys and girls try to imitate what he did against Real Madrid.
